subject: docs: ban AskUserQuestion tool, add import ID removal plan
body:
Add hard rule to CLAUDE.md permanently banning the AskUserQuestion
tool — it breaks the session UI. Options must be listed as numbered
text instead. Add working plan for removing ID dependencies from
the import/merge pipeline.

Tags: docs, conventions, import
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: remove-import-ids
Semver: patch

title: ban AskUserQuestion tool, add import ID removal plan
